summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Caisse POS system for Espace Maxo. All features working: login with 'Caisse2026' password, invoice CRUD, PDF export, all tabs (Caisse, Factures, Statistiques, Produits, Clients, Utilisateurs), and discreet footer link to /caisse.

console_warnings.details: Console shows 'Encountered two children with the same key' warnings when switching department tabs
console_warnings.severity: Minor - cosmetic, does not affect functionality

passed_tests: ✅ Backend: POST /api/caisse/login with 'Caisse2026' returns success, admin role, and JWT token
✅ Backend: POST /api/caisse/login with 'Esp@ceM@xo2026' returns success (alternate admin password)
✅ Backend: POST /api/caisse/login with wrong password returns 401
✅ Backend: GET /api/invoices returns list of invoices
✅ Backend: POST /api/invoices creates invoice with correct invoice_number format (EM-YYYYMMDD-XXXX)
✅ Backend: GET /api/invoices/{id} returns correct invoice
✅ Backend: GET /api/invoices/stats returns daily stats with revenue breakdown by department
✅ Backend: GET /api/invoices/stats/monthly returns monthly stats
✅ Backend: GET /api/invoices/{id}/pdf returns valid PDF document (200 status, PDF header)
✅ Backend: GET /api/invoices/non-existent-id/pdf returns 404
✅ Backend: GET /api/caisse/products returns product list
✅ Backend: POST /api/caisse/products creates product
✅ Backend: DELETE /api/caisse/products/{id} deletes product
✅ Backend: GET /api/caisse/clients returns client list
✅ Backend: POST /api/caisse/clients creates client
✅ Backend: GET /api/caisse/users returns user list
✅ Backend: POST /api/caisse/users creates user with SHA256 password hash
✅ Frontend: Login page loads with CAISSE PRO title, Espace Maxo branding
✅ Frontend: Login with 'Caisse2026' password works - shows 'Bienvenue Administrateur' toast
✅ Frontend: All 6 tabs visible after login (Caisse, Factures, Statistiques, Produits, Clients, Utilisateurs)
✅ Frontend: Caisse tab shows department sub-tabs (Salle de Jeux, Bar, Jardin)
✅ Frontend: Products display with name, price, and unit (VR 360° - 2000 F/partie, Simulateur Course - 1500 F/partie)
✅ Frontend: Adding products to cart updates invoice total correctly
✅ Frontend: Payment methods available (Espèces, Carte bancaire, Mobile Money, Chèque)
✅ Frontend: Invoice save shows 'Facture enregistrée!' toast notification
✅ Frontend: Factures tab displays invoices with invoice_number, amount, payment method, department breakdown
✅ Frontend: Statistiques tab shows monthly stats (Chiffre d'affaires, Salle de Jeux, Bar, Jardin breakdown)
✅ Frontend: Footer contains discreet link (•) to /caisse via data-testid='footer-caisse-link'
✅ Frontend: Discreet footer link successfully navigates to /caisse page
action_items: MINOR: Fix React duplicate key warning in CaissePage.jsx - when rendering products, ensure unique keys by combining product.id with department
seed_data_creation: Created test invoices, products, clients, and users via API during testing (prefixed with TEST_)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Caisse POS system fully functional. Login uses master password 'Caisse2026' or 'Esp@ceM@xo2026'. PDF export uses reportlab. Discreet footer link is a '•' character that navigates to /caisse. Minor React key warning exists but doesn't affect functionality.
